title: 10,000 Hours
why_this_song: 10,000 Hours by Justin Bieber (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm gonna love you (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
Do you miss the road that you grew up on?
Did you get your middle name from your grandma?
When you think about your forever now
Tell me, what are you dreamin'?
Everything, I wanna know it all

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hours" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hours" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sweet" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sweet" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When you think about your forever now
I'm gonna love you (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "10,000 Hours" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "10,000 Hours" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "10,000 Hours" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "10,000 Hours" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "10,000 Hours" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "10,000 Hours"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "10,000 Hours", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "10,000 Hours", o que aconteceria?
